message:
fix(generated): Regenerate manifest_index.sh to sync SHA256 hash

The manifest file (acfs.manifest.yaml) was updated but the generated
manifest_index.sh wasn't regenerated, causing a bootstrap mismatch error:
  "Bootstrap mismatch: generated scripts do not match manifest."

This happens because the installer validates that the downloaded manifest
matches the hash stored in manifest_index.sh. When these get out of sync,
fresh installs fail immediately.

Root cause: manifest was updated in a prior commit but `bun run generate`
wasn't executed to regenerate manifest_index.sh with the new hash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 # ============================================================
 # Data-only manifest index. Safe to source.
 
-ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="c36c792a06e4c6ed3b45413945726cbe23a50f00602481dbd49266e735ab4ec8"
+ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="6114169397883c87c450aea015574d366a988c0194770d6f44be4dc037ab847d"
 
 ACFS_MODULES_IN_ORDER=(
   "base.system"
